sql_array: CREATE TABLE datetime_test (id UInt32, event_time String);
SELECT id, parseDateTimeBestEffortOrZero(event_time) AS parsed_time FROM datetime_test;
UPDATE datetime_test SET event_time = '2023-10-01 13:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, parseDateTimeBestEffortOrZero(event_time) AS parsed_time FROM datetime_test WHERE parsed_time > 0;
